title: Cutters and Trimmers, Hand
description: Use hand tools or hand-held power tools to cut and trim a variety of manufactured items, such as carpet, fabric, stone, glass, or rubber.

tasks.text: Mark or discard items with defects such as spots, stains, scars, snags, chips, scratches, or unacceptable shapes or finishes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim excess material or cut threads off finished products, such as cutting loose ends of plastic off a manufactured toy for a smoother finish.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut, shape, and trim materials, such as textiles, food, glass, stone, and metal, using knives, scissors, and other hand tools, portable power tools, or bench-mounted tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position templates or measure materials to locate specified points of cuts or to obtain maximum yields, using rules, scales, or patterns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read work orders to determine dimensions, cutting locations, and quantities to cut.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark cutting lines around patterns or templates, or follow layout points, using squares, rules, and straightedges, and chalk, pencils, or scribes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark identification numbers, trademarks, grades, marketing data, sizes, or model numbers on products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unroll, lay out, attach, or mount materials or items on cutting tables or machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Separate materials or products according to size, weight, type, condition, color, or shade.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fold or shape materials before or after cutting them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace or sharpen dulled cutting tools such as saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lower table-mounted cutters such as knife blades, cutting wheels, or saws to cut items to specified sizes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stack cut items and load them on racks or conveyors or onto trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust guides and stops to control depths and widths of cuts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Count or weigh and bundle items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, treat, buff, or polish finished items, using grinders, brushes, chisels, and cleaning solutions and polishing materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Route items to provide cutouts for parts, using portable routers, grinders, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport items to work or storage areas, using carts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
